authors: Tamar Ashuri Lior Zalmanson Dovev Goldstein a Department of Communication
raw_title: Journalistic Epistemic Authority in the Age of AI: The Incorporation of Generative AI in Newsrooms
title_en: Journalistic Epistemic Authority in the Age of AI: The Incorporation of Generative AI in Newsrooms
title_zh: 人工智能时代的新闻认知权威：生成式人工智能在新闻编辑室的融入
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了在人工智能时代，新闻工作者如何保持他们的专业权威和可信度，特别是当生成式人工智能工具被引入新闻编辑室时。它关注人工智能如何影响新闻制作过程和公众对新闻的信任。
plain_summary_en: This research explores how journalists maintain their professional authority and credibility in the age of AI, especially as generative AI tools are integrated into newsrooms. It focuses on how AI affects news production processes and public trust in journalism.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字新闻中技术采纳对专业权威和认知实践的影响，特别是在人工智能等新兴技术背景下。
research_direction_en: Investigating the impact of technology adoption on professional authority and epistemic practices in digital journalism, particularly with emerging technologies like AI.
